## NYT::NFlow::TDynamicUnitedParameters&lt;NYT::NFlow::TServiceLogSource&gt; {#NYT_NFlow_TDynamicUnitedParameters_NYT_NFlow_TServiceLogSource}

#|
|| **Parameter** | **Description** ||
|| `desired_partition_count` | **Type**: `long`
**Default value**: `5`
Desired number of partitions. Estimate as 1 partition per 1 MB/s of stream. ||
|| `desired_cycle_time` | **Type**: [TDuration](./all_yson_structs#TDuration)
**Default value**: `12h`
The source will try to maintain a message generation rate that traverses the entire table once every `desired_cycle_time`. ||
|#
